option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# Implementação de Features de Segurança no Auth Service
## Resumo das Alterações
As seguintes melhorias de segurança foram implementadas no `auth.service` com base nas features já presentes no `account.service`:
### 1. **Validação Estrutural de JWT** ✅ **Arquivo:** `JwtAuthenticationFilter.java`
- Adicionada verificação de token vazio (`isBlank()`) - Adicionada validação de estrutura JWT (deve ter 3 partes separadas por `.`) - Melhor logging de debug e warn para tokens inválidos - Estrutura similiar ao `JwtAuthFilter` do account.service
**Benefício:** Evita processamento desnecessário de tokens malformados
### 2. **Logging Detalhado** ✅ **Arquivo:** `JwtAuthenticationFilter.java`
- Adicionado `@Slf4j` para logging - Logs debug para: header ausente, token validado com sucesso - Logs warn para: token vazio, estrutura inválida, token expirado - Logs de exceção com detalhes
**Benefício:** Melhor rastreabilidade de problemas de autenticação
### 3. **Exceção `AccessDeniedException`** ✅ **Arquivo:** `exception/AccessDeniedException.java`
- Criada classe de exceção customizada - Handler no `GlobalExceptionHandler` retorna HTTP 403 (FORBIDDEN) - Segue o padrão do account.service
**Benefício:** Respostas de erro padronizadas e mais semânticas
### 4. **Migração para Resilience4j Rate Limiter** ✅ **Arquivos Alterados:** - `pom.xml`: Adicionadas dependências - `AuthController.java`: Anotações `@RateLimiter` nos endpoints `/login` e `/register` - `application.properties`: Configuração de instâncias de rate limiting - `Application.java`: Adicionado `@EnableAspectJAutoProxy` - `WebMvcConfig.java`: Removido interceptor manual, usando annotations agora
**Configuração:** ```properties resilience4j.ratelimiter.instances.authLogin.limitForPeriod=5 resilience4j.ratelimiter.instances.authLogin.limitRefreshPeriod=1m
resilience4j.ratelimiter.instances.authRegister.limitForPeriod=5 resilience4j.ratelimiter.instances.authRegister.limitRefreshPeriod=1m ```
**Benefício:** Rate limiting centralizado e distribuído via Resilience4j (compatível com múltiplas instâncias)
### 5. **Exposição de Métricas** ✅ **Arquivo:** `application.properties`
- Adicionado `metrics` aos endpoints expostos do Actuator - `management.endpoints.web.exposure.include=health,info,metrics`
**Benefício:** Monitoramento de rate limiting e métricas de desempenho
## Dependências Adicionadas
```xml <dependency> <groupId>io.github.resilience4j</groupId> <artifactId>resilience4j-spring-boot3</artifactId> <version>2.1.0</version> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>io.github.resilience4j</groupId> <artifactId>resilience4j-ratelimiter</artifactId> <version>2.1.0</version> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>io.github.resilience4j</groupId> <artifactId>resilience4j-annotations</artifactId> <version>2.1.0</version> </dependency> ```
## Build
O build foi testado com sucesso: - Compilação: ✅ SUCCESS - Package: ✅ SUCCESS
## Próximos Passos (Opcionais)
1. **Adicionar Redis para Rate Limiting Distribuído**: Se o serviço for escalado horizontalmente, pode-se adicionar Redis para sincronizar o estado do rate limiting entre instâncias.
2. **Adicionar Cache com Redis**: Implementar caching de usuários autenticados (similar ao account.service)
3. **Configurar Alertas**: Configurar alertas no Actuator para quando o rate limit for atingido frequentemente
4. **Documentação OpenAPI/Swagger**: Adicionar informações sobre rate limiting na documentação da API
## Status
✅ **Todas as implementações foram concluídas com sucesso**
Os endpoints de login e registro agora têm proteção contra brute force com o Resilience4j Rate Limiter, melhor validação de JWT e logging detalhado.

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 https://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd"> <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion> <parent> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-parent</artifactId> <version>3.5.13</version> <relativePath/> <!-- lookup parent from repository --> </parent> <groupId>auth</groupId> <artifactId>auth.service</artifactId> <version>0.0.1-SNAPSHOT</version> <name/> <description/> <url/> <licenses> <license/> </licenses> <developers> <developer/> </developers> <scm> <connection/> <developerConnection/> <tag/> <url/> </scm> <properties> <java.version>21</java.version> </properties> <dependencies> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-actuator</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-data-jpa</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-oauth2-resource-server</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-security</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>io.jsonwebtoken</groupId> <artifactId>jjwt-api</artifactId> <version>0.12.3</version> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>io.jsonwebtoken</groupId> <artifactId>jjwt-impl</artifactId> <version>0.12.3</version> <scope>runtime</scope> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>io.jsonwebtoken</groupId> <artifactId>jjwt-jackson</artifactId> <version>0.12.3</version> <scope>runtime</scope> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-validation</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-web</artifactId> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>org.postgresql</groupId> <artifactId>postgresql</artifactId> <scope>runtime</scope> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.flywaydb</groupId> <artifactId>flyway-core</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.flywaydb</groupId> <artifactId>flyway-database-postgresql</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId> <artifactId>lombok</artifactId> <optional>true</optional> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-test</artifactId> <scope>test</scope> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.security</groupId> <artifactId>spring-security-test</artifactId> <scope>test</scope> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>com.h2database</groupId> <artifactId>h2</artifactId> <scope>test</scope> </dependency> </dependencies>
<build> <plugins> <plugin> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-maven-plugin</artifactId> <configuration> <excludes> <exclude> <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId> <artifactId>lombok</artifactId> </exclude> </excludes> </configuration> </plugin> <plugin> <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId> <artifactId>maven-compiler-plugin</artifactId> <executions> <execution> <id>default-compile</id> <phase>compile</phase> <goals> <goal>compile</goal> </goals> <configuration> <annotationProcessorPaths> <path> <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId> <artifactId>lombok</artifactId> </path> </annotationProcessorPaths> </configuration> </execution> <execution> <id>default-testCompile</id> <phase>test-compile</phase> <goals> <goal>testCompile</goal> </goals> <configuration> <annotationProcessorPaths> <path> <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId> <artifactId>lombok</artifactId> </path> </annotationProcessorPaths> </configuration> </execution> </executions> </plugin> </plugins> </build>
</project>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 https://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd"> <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion> <parent> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-parent</artifactId> <version>3.5.13</version> <relativePath/> <!-- lookup parent from repository --> </parent> <groupId>auth</groupId> <artifactId>auth.service</artifactId> <version>0.0.1-SNAPSHOT</version> <name/> <description/> <url/> <licenses> <license/> </licenses> <developers> <developer/> </developers> <scm> <connection/> <developerConnection/> <tag/> <url/> </scm> <properties> <java.version>21</java.version> <jjwt.version>0.12.3</jjwt.version> <resilience4j.version>2.1.0</resilience4j.version> </properties> <dependencies> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-actuator</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-data-jpa</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-oauth2-resource-server</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-security</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>io.jsonwebtoken</groupId> <artifactId>jjwt-api</artifactId> <version>${jjwt.version}</version> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>io.jsonwebtoken</groupId> <artifactId>jjwt-impl</artifactId> <version>${jjwt.version}</version> <scope>runtime</scope> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>io.jsonwebtoken</groupId> <artifactId>jjwt-jackson</artifactId> <version>${jjwt.version}</version> <scope>runtime</scope> </dependency>
<!-- Resilience4j --> <dependency> <groupId>io.github.resilience4j</groupId> <artifactId>resilience4j-spring-boot3</artifactId> <version>${resilience4j.version}</version> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>io.github.resilience4j</groupId> <artifactId>resilience4j-ratelimiter</artifactId> <version>${resilience4j.version}</version> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>io.github.resilience4j</groupId> <artifactId>resilience4j-annotations</artifactId> <version>${resilience4j.version}</version> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-validation</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-web</artifactId> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>org.postgresql</groupId> <artifactId>postgresql</artifactId> <scope>runtime</scope> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.flywaydb</groupId> <artifactId>flyway-core</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.flywaydb</groupId> <artifactId>flyway-database-postgresql</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId> <artifactId>lombok</artifactId> <optional>true</optional> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-test</artifactId> <scope>test</scope> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.security</groupId> <artifactId>spring-security-test</artifactId> <scope>test</scope> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>com.h2database</groupId> <artifactId>h2</artifactId> <scope>test</scope> </dependency> </dependencies>
<build> <plugins> <plugin> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-maven-plugin</artifactId> <configuration> <excludes> <exclude> <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId> <artifactId>lombok</artifactId> </exclude> </excludes> </configuration> </plugin> <plugin> <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId> <artifactId>maven-compiler-plugin</artifactId> <executions> <execution> <id>default-compile</id> <phase>compile</phase> <goals> <goal>compile</goal> </goals> <configuration> <annotationProcessorPaths> <path> <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId> <artifactId>lombok</artifactId> </path> </annotationProcessorPaths> </configuration> </execution> <execution> <id>default-testCompile</id> <phase>test-compile</phase> <goals> <goal>testCompile</goal> </goals> <configuration> <annotationProcessorPaths> <path> <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId> <artifactId>lombok</artifactId> </path> </annotationProcessorPaths> </configuration> </execution> </executions> </plugin> </plugins> </build>
</project>

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
